required_preferences.fact: Holds team video coaching sessions only on remote workdays — conducts in-person team meetings at headquarters on required onsite days, no longer restricting to Tuesdays/Thursdays

supersedes.fact: Schedules team video coaching sessions strictly on Tuesdays and Thursdays — avoids meetings on Mondays and Fridays

required_preferences.fact: Reads business biographies and industry magazines exclusively on flights or in hotel lounges during work trips — rarely makes time for business reading at home now

supersedes.fact: Reads business biographies and industry magazines at home during recovery — avoids travel media habits as he's not flying

required_preferences.fact: Prepares his mother's medication and breakfast every morning before work — prioritizes this over personal routines such as responding to emails early
Requires sales reps to submit weekly CRM reports by Sunday night — never accepts late submissions
Hosts family dinner every Sunday — never schedules work events that conflict with this ritual
Refuses to answer work texts after 8pm — only responds to urgent emails flagged by senior leadership

persona: A regional sales director overseeing a team of 15 representatives
